zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas De Walton於1370年出生在英國亨廷格多史爾格亞特 斯陶頓時，他的父親Sir John de Walton55歲，母親Margaret de Sutton54歲。他於1395年與Duchess Alana de Berry在英國亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓結婚。他們至少是7個兒子的父母。他去世於1437年在英國貝德福爾貝德福德享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas De Walton于1370年出生在英国亨廷格多史爾格亞特 斯陶頓时，他的父亲Sir John de Walton55岁，母亲Margaret de Sutton54岁。他于1395年与Duchess Alana de Berry在英国亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓结婚。他们至少是7个儿子的父母。他去世于1437年在英国貝德福爾貝德福德享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called Walton, which are named with Old English walh ‘foreigner, Briton, serf’ (genitive plural wala), wald ‘woodland’, wall ‘wall’, or wælla ‘well, spring, stream’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

History: George Walton (1741–1804) signed the Declaration of Independence. He was born in Prince Edward County, VA, whither his grandfather had emigrated from England in 1682. He moved to Savannah, GA, and became governor of GA and a prominent jurist.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Simon , now rare, but more common in the Middle Ages, when it gave rise to the surnames Simms and Simpson.

variants.name: Simon
meanings: Usual English form of Simeon , borne in the New Testament by various characters: two apostles, a brother of Jesus, a Pharisee, a leper, a tanner, a sorcerer (who offered money for the gifts of the Holy Ghost, giving rise to the term simony), and the man who carried Jesus's cross to the Crucifixion.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas De Walton was born in 1370, in Great Staughton, Huntingdonshire, England, his father, Sir John de Walton, was 55 and his mother, Margaret de Sutton, was 54. He married Duchess Alana de Berry in 1395, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons. He died in 1437, in Bedford, Bedfordshire, England, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas De Walton est né en 1370, à Great Staughton, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Walton, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Sutton, avait 54 ans. Il a épousé Duchess Alana de Berry en 1395, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils. Il est décédé en 1437, à Bedford, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 67 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Waltonが1370年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアグレアト スタウトンで生まれた時，父Sir John de Waltonは55歳，母Margaret de Suttonは54歳であった。1395年にイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンでDuchess Alana de Berryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子の親であった。彼は1437年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアベドフォードで67歳で死去した。

ko.St. Andrews Barnards Castle, London, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 시드c업 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas De Walton(이)가 1370년 영국 헌틴그도실르 그리트 스타그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Walton(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Sutton(은)는 54세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 Duchess Alana de Berry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1437년 영국 베드퍼드실르 베드퍼드에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas De Walton nasceu em 1370, em Great Staughton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Walton, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Sutton, tinha 54 anos. Ele casou-se com Duchess Alana de Berry em 1395, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1437, em Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, com 67 anos.

ru.St. Andrews Barnards Castle, London, Eng: ст андрю'с чурч, сидкуп, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas De Walton родился в 1370 г. в местности грит стотон, хантингдоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Walton было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Sutton, 54. Он женился на женщине по имени Duchess Alana de Berry в 1395 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей. Он умер в 1437 г. в местности бедфорд, бедфордшир, Англия в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas De Walton nació en 1370, en Great Staughton, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Walton, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Margaret de Sutton, tenía 54 años. Se casó con Duchess Alana de Berry en 1395, en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos. Murió en 1437, en Bedford, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 67 años.
